name: UNSTABLE SMP
description:
This is pretty straight forward bot, one day i was scrolling trought the Unstable SMP bot on this site, and I found one but it barely has any token in it, also this is my first bot, and English is not my first language expect some disappointment also use a Minecraft based persona for better experience with this bot.

Version 0.1 - added humanized PVP system and more clear hardcore Minecraft server system

Version 0.2 - Added the four protagonist scenario

Version 0.3 - Added the law scenario

anyone knows how to make a lore book? please teach me

-discord usn: v1cio_us

bye my head hurts
